name: Chart
goal: Render a Chart.js-backed line / bar / radar / pie / doughnut chart from JSON data + options attributes.
description: Lazy-loaded Chart.js wrapper. On first update injects a <script src=…> for Chart.js if window.Chart is not already present, then mounts a chart on a managed canvas. Honors live updates to type / data / options by destroying and re-mounting. Renders an inline error block if the script fails to load.

props.name: src
props.description: URL for the Chart.js UMD bundle. Override to bundle locally.

props.name: data
props.description: Chart.js data object (JS prop or JSON attribute).

props.name: options
props.description: Chart.js options object (JS prop or JSON attribute).

globalDependencies.purpose: Reads Chart.js global to mount the chart instance.
Appends a <script> tag to load Chart.js when window.Chart is undefined.

sideEffects.description: Fetches Chart.js UMD bundle from the configured src URL the first time any ce-chart upgrades.
sideEffects.reason: Keeps the core bundle small; consumers who self-host can override src or pre-load Chart.js.

sideEffects.description: Mounts a Chart.js instance on an internal <canvas>; destroys and re-creates it when data/type/options change.
sideEffects.reason: Chart.js is canvas-backed and requires explicit destroy() to free resources.
